dict.string: Urban Ghost Hunters uses Bluetooth to detect nearby ghost-hunting agents in your area.
Urban Ghost Hunters uses Bluetooth to detect nearby ghost-hunting agents in your area.
Urban Ghost Hunters uses your camera to capture photographic evidence during paranormal investigations.
Urban Ghost Hunters uses your microphone to detect audio anomalies and lure spirits during investigations.
Urban Ghost Hunters uses your location to detect nearby paranormal hotspots and guide you to investigation sites.
Urban Ghost Hunters scans NFC totems to unlock special ghost-hunting abilities and equipment.
